task.name: cost-report

metadata.description: Generate a final cost report comparing estimated vs actual costs for an episode, including variance analysis, retake history with reasons, and revision costs.

input.name: actuals
input.description: Recorded actual costs from all API calls made during production, logged per scene and tool.

input.name: estimate
input.description: Original cost estimate generated by the cost-estimate task (T2).

output.description: Comprehensive cost report with variance analysis, breakdowns by tool/scene/phase, retake history, and revision costs.

step.name: Load Inputs
step.description: Load the actuals file and original estimate for comparison.

actions.action: Read _cost/actuals/{episode_id}-actuals.yaml Parse all actual cost entries (transactions). Each transaction contains: scene_id, tool, model, resolution, cost, timestamp, is_retake, retake_reason
Read _cost/estimates/{episode_id}-estimate.yaml Extract per_scene_breakdown, tool_totals, and summary from the original estimate.

checks.check: WARN: "Original estimate not found. Report will show actuals only without variance analysis. Run /cookie-cost-estimate to generate an estimate." Set has_estimate = false.

step.name: Breakdown by Tool
step.description: Aggregate actuals by tool and calculate variance against estimate.

actions.action: Group all transactions by tool name. For each tool, compute: - actual_calls: count of transactions for this tool - actual_cost: sum of transaction costs - retake_count: count of transactions where is_retake == true - retake_cost: sum of costs for retake transactions

If has_estimate == true, for each tool: - estimated_calls = estimate.tool_totals[tool].total_calls - estimated_cost = estimate.tool_totals[tool].total_cost - variance = actual_cost - estimated_cost - variance_percent = (variance / estimated_cost) * 100

step.name: Breakdown by Scene
step.description: Aggregate actuals by scene and calculate variance against estimate.

actions.action: Group all transactions by scene_id. For each scene, compute: - actual_cost: sum of transaction costs for this scene - actual_calls: count of transactions - retake_count: count of retake transactions - retake_cost: sum of retake costs - retake_reasons: collect all retake_reason values

If has_estimate == true, for each scene: - estimated_cost = estimate.per_scene_breakdown[scene_id].scene_cost - variance = actual_cost - estimated_cost - variance_percent = (variance / estimated_cost) * 100 - status = "under" if variance < 0, "on_budget" if abs(variance_percent) <= 5, "over" if variance > 0
Flag scenes present in actuals but not in estimate as "unplanned"
Flag scenes in estimate but absent from actuals as "not_executed"

step.name: Breakdown by Phase
step.description: Classify each actual cost into a production phase and aggregate.

actions.action: Map each transaction to a phase based on tool or explicit phase field: - pre-production: character ref generation, validation tasks - production: veo, imagen, nano-banana, elevenlabs/chirp, playwright - post-production: ffmpeg, merge, continuity review, image editing - delivery: format adaptation, final render, remotion
For each phase, compute: - total_cost: sum of all transaction costs in this phase - total_calls: count of transactions - percentage_of_total: (total_cost / grand_actual_total) * 100

step.name: Retake History
step.description: Build a detailed retake log with reasons from the actuals data.

actions.action: Filter all transactions where is_retake == true. For each retake entry, collect: - scene_id - tool - retake_reason (why the retake was needed) - cost - timestamp

Calculate: - total_retakes: count of all retake transactions - total_retake_cost: sum of all retake costs - retake_percentage_of_total: (total_retake_cost / actual_total) * 100 - Compare against estimated retake buffer: retake_buffer_used_percent = (total_retake_cost / estimate.retake_buffer.amount) * 100
Group retakes by scene_id to show which scenes required the most retakes. Sort by retake count descending.

step.name: Revision Costs
step.description: Isolate and tally revision-related costs separately from initial generation costs.

actions.action: Revisions are actuals entries where version > 1 or explicitly tagged as a revision. Group revisions by scene_id. For each scene with revisions: - revision_count: number of revision passes - revision_cost: total cost of all revisions for this scene

Calculate totals: - total_revisions: sum of all revision_count values - total_revision_cost: sum of all revision costs - avg_revision_cost_per_scene: total_revision_cost / count of scenes with revisions

step.name: Compute Summary
step.description: Compute the overall summary statistics and budget status.

actions.action: total_estimated = estimate.summary.estimated_total (if available) total_actual = sum of all actual transaction costs total_variance = total_actual - total_estimated total_variance_percent = (total_variance / total_estimated) * 100
Determine budget_status: - "under_budget": variance_percent < -5 - "on_budget": -5 <= variance_percent <= 5 - "over_budget": variance_percent > 5

step.name: Write Report
step.description: Write the final cost report to the output path.

actions.action: Ensure _cost/reports/ directory exists
Write {episode_id}-final-report.yaml with the schema below

step.name: Project-Level Aggregation
step.description: If project-config.yaml exists, generate a project-level cost report aggregating across all episodes.

actions.action: Check if project-config.yaml exists in the project root. If it does not exist, skip this step (single-episode mode).
Load project-config.yaml to get: - project_id - budget.total_project_budget - budget.per_episode_budget - budget.alert_at_percent - budget.halt_at_percent - episodes[] array for episode registry

Scan all _cost/actuals/*.yaml files to collect actuals for every episode. For each episode found: - episode_id - status (from episode-config.yaml or project-config.yaml) - total estimated cost (from _cost/estimates/{episode_id}-estimate.yaml) - total actual cost (sum of all transactions)

Identify shared costs: - Character generation transactions where the character is listed in project-config.yaml shared_characters[] - Environment generation transactions - Brand asset costs Tag these as "shared" and separate them from episode-specific costs.

Calculate project-level aggregates: - total_spent: sum of all episode actuals + shared costs - remaining: total_project_budget - total_spent - budget_utilization: (total_spent / total_project_budget) * 100 - amortized_per_episode: total shared costs / number of episodes

Determine project budget status: - If budget_utilization < alert_at_percent: "on_track" - If budget_utilization >= alert_at_percent AND < halt_at_percent: "warning" - If budget_utilization >= halt_at_percent: "halt"
Write project-level report to _cost/reports/PROJECT-{project_id}-report.yaml using the project output schema below.

error.action: WARN: "Original estimate not found. Report will show actuals only. Run /cookie-cost-estimate first."

error.condition: Scene in actuals not in estimate
error.action: WARN: "Scene '{scene_id}' found in actuals but not in original estimate -- marked as unplanned cost."

error.condition: Scene in estimate not in actuals
error.action: WARN: "Scene '{scene_id}' was estimated but no actual costs recorded -- marked as not executed."

error.condition: Project config exists but no episodes found
error.action: WARN: "project-config.yaml exists but no episode actuals found. Project-level report will be empty."
